title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/common to v0.52.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/common](https://togithub.com/containers/common) | require | minor | `v0.51.1-0.20230406124934-ff62cdebdd0e` -> `v0.52.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/common</summary>

### [`v0.52.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/common/releases/tag/v0.52.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/common/compare/v0.51.2...v0.52.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to v0.51.0 by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1305](https://togithub.com/containers/common/pull/1305)
